Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary legal education, cultivating professional competence and analytical skills, directly contributing to equal access to quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and relevant skills for employment (Target 4.4).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: While legal skills can lead to decent work, the syllabus lacks explicit evidence to directly link to this goal's targets.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course explicitly covers '都市計畫審查程序' (Urban Planning Review Procedure), which directly relates to developing quality, reliable, sustainable, and resilient infrastructure (Target 9.1).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: '行政救濟法' (Law on Administrative Remedies) provides legal mechanisms to challenge administrative actions, directly supporting equal opportunity and reducing inequalities by addressing discriminatory practices (Target 10.3).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course explicitly includes '都市計畫審查程序' (Urban Planning Review Procedure), a direct mechanism for enhancing sustainable urbanization and human settlement planning and management (Target 11.3).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course 'Law on Administrative Remedies' is fundamentally about promoting the rule of law and ensuring equal access to justice (Target 16.3) and developing effective, accountable, and transparent institutions (Target 16.6).
